title: sorghum iwarancusa
intro: Sorghum iwarancusa, also known as the Guinea corn or bitter sorghum, is a plant species that belongs to the sorghum family and is primarily native to Africa. The medicinal properties of Sorghum iwarancusa include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of consuming Sorghum iwarancusa include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide essential nutrients like protein and fiber. The herbal preparations of Sorghum iwarancusa include tea and infusion, which can be made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water to extract its medicinal compounds.
